args:
set -eu
rg -n 'host\.flashinfer_prebuilt_available = false;' engine/src/planner.rs >/dev/null
rg -n 'flashinfer_prebuilt_available: true' app/src/lib.rs engine/src/planner.rs >/dev/null
rg -n 'supported_operating_systems: vec!\[OperatingSystem::Linux\]' engine/src/planner.rs >/dev/null
printf 'doctor-degraded-host\n'
